posts.title: How to Sell an Inherited Property in Sacramento: A Plain-English 2026 Guide
posts.author: Matt Vorwerk
posts.excerpt: Inherited a house in Sacramento and not sure what to do next? A step-by-step guide to probate, taxes, repairs, and your options for selling fast — without the legal jargon.

posts.title: Facing Foreclosure in Sacramento? Your Options Explained
posts.author: Matt Vorwerk
posts.excerpt: Behind on your mortgage in Sacramento? Learn the California foreclosure timeline, your rights under AB 2424, and five realistic options to protect your equity.
